name: Warbot Engineer
short_description: This is an exhilarating bullet-hell shooting game.
detailed_description:
• "Warbot Engineer" is a high-freedom mech customization combat game that offers players an ultimate customization experience. You can freely adjust key parameters of the mech, such as movement speed, defense, mobility, and attack power, creating a unique battle mech that matches your fighting style.

  • In a hail of bullets, you'll pilot your customized mech to face fierce enemies, defeating them with precise controls and strategic adjustments. Every time you complete a level, you'll earn gears, which can be used to further enhance your mech, boosting its power.

  • The game offers two different types of mechs, each with unique characteristics to meet different combat needs. Use the customization system flexibly to create the ultimate battle mech that suits you and conquer the battlefield!

supported_languages:
English*, Russian*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
